name: Hedwig
role: Messenger owl for Hedwig's V1 capture chamber

liveCanvas.notes: PixelLab generated a full character-scale owl. The live rotations are repacked on the same transparent canvas with a smaller visible bird silhouette so Hedwig reads as an owl beside the other chamber agents.

idle-flutter.notes: get_object reports the animation as completed, but available MCP/download endpoints returned only the static PNG or 404 for guessed animation-frame downloads.

notes: South rotation is a scaled/repacked version of the PixelLab generated owl. East/west/north are temporary static derivatives until a full directional character/object pass is generated.
